title: Making Space
excerpt: Thought I would add a bit of color to Danielle LaPorte's truthbomb that I got in my inbox a while back. As important as it is to me to make stuff, I realize as I get older that I also…
body:
Thought I would add a bit of color to Danielle LaPorte's truthbomb that I got in my inbox a while back. As important as it is to me to make stuff, I realize as I get older that I also have to make space for what I want as well. 

Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton Select brush online at Joann. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!

Some of my favorite quotes are available as printable PDF's in the shop! And for the rest of October, they are on sale! Thank you as always for your support and love!
